title: Academic Conference English
description: Poster sessions, chairing panels, asking good questions, networking over coffee.
summary_pt_br: Conferência acadêmica: elogiar específico, perguntar por método, continuar no café, trocar cartão.

scenes.subtitle_en: Poster sessions, chairing panels, asking good questions, networking over coffee.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Conferência acadêmica: elogiar específico, perguntar por método, continuar no café, trocar cartão.

scenes.text_en: Poster sessions, chairing panels, asking good questions, networking over coffee. Focus: academic conference english. I found your argument about bias particularly compelling.
scenes.text_pt: Conferência acadêmica: elogiar específico, perguntar por método, continuar no café, trocar cartão. Foco: academic conference english. Achei seu argumento sobre viés particularmente convincente.

scenes.title: Academic Conference English
scenes.body_en: Useful phrases: 'I found your argument about X particularly compelling.', 'Could you say more about the methodology?', 'I'd love to continue this over coffee.', 'Here's my card.'
scenes.body_pt: Conferência acadêmica: elogiar específico, perguntar por método, continuar no café, trocar cartão.

examples.en: I found your argument about bias particularly compelling.
examples.pt: Achei seu argumento sobre viés particularmente convincente.

examples.en: Could you say more about your methodology?
examples.pt: Poderia falar mais sobre sua metodologia?

examples.en: I'd love to continue this over coffee later.

exercise.question: Complete: "I found your argument about bias ___ compelling."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I found your argument about bias particularly compelling."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Achei seu argumento sobre viés particularmente convincente.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Could you say more about your methodology?
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Could you say more about your methodology?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Poderia falar mais sobre sua metodologia?

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Academic Conference English — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre academic conference english. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, approach a speaker after their talk.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I found your argument on bias compelling.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Could you say more about your sampling?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Would you like to grab coffee later?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here's my card. Send me your paper?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you — it was a pleasure.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Conference English is networking at academic pace.

scenes.title: The coffee break
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three networking moves. Use at least three conference phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the coffee break between sessions, Kumar watched a young scholar navigate the conference with remarkable composure.

paragraphs.speaker: Scholar
paragraphs.en: I found your argument about bias in large language models particularly compelling this morning.

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker
paragraphs.en: Thank you — that section took me almost a year to structure clearly without losing the nuance.

paragraphs.speaker: Scholar
paragraphs.en: Could you say more about your methodology for the human evaluation phase of the study?

paragraphs.speaker: Speaker
paragraphs.en: Let's continue this over coffee. Here's my card — I'd love to read any follow-up you write on it.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Academic English, Kumar believed, reaches its final form in unscripted conversations between two curious strangers.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Academic Conference English". Poster sessions, chairing panels, asking good questions, networking over coffee. I found your argument about bias particularly compelling. Could you say more about your methodology? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Academic Conference English". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Academic Conference English".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Academic Conference English".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: Aeon Essays
sources.pt_hint: Ensaios longos de filosofia, ciência e cultura.
